scripts.dev: bun run stop:dev && concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "bun run dev:backend" "bun run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: bun run build:backend && bun run build:frontend
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd backend typecheck && bun run --cwd frontend typecheck
scripts.test: bun run --cwd backend test && bun run --cwd frontend test
